title: Time Is Running Out
why_this_song: Time Is Running Out by Muse (2003) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I won't let you bury it"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Bury it"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "And our time is running out"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "And our time is running out"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "You can't push it underground"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "won't" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "won't" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "bury" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "bury" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You can't stop it screaming out

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Ooh, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Muse one question about "Time Is Running Out", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Muse sobre "Time Is Running Out", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Time Is Running Out" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Time Is Running Out" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Time Is Running Out" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Time Is Running Out" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
